Licensed child care in Vancouver

3 licensed facilities. The status chip reflects each facility's most recent health authority inspection.

Cedar Grove Group Child CareFollow-up requiredGroup Child Care (30 Months to School Age) · 990 Commercial Dr · Capacity 25 Little Cedars Family Child CareCompliantFamily Child Care · 2245 W 14th Ave · Capacity 7 Orca Cove Group Child CareCompliantGroup Child Care (Under 36 Months) · 1633 Yew St · Capacity 12
CareCheck BC republishes public licensing and inspection information for convenience. It is not affiliated with the Province of BC or any health authority. Always verify details with the facility and the official provincial resources before making care decisions.
